calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daphne Lin for Chris Forney (Petitioner/Administrator). Amanda Ebey for Robert Forney. Katrina Forney in Propria Persona.

Ms. Lin stated that the Probate Referee has been paid and that they she has receipts for both appraisals. The Court stated that the personal property was never inventoried and therefore statutory and extraordinary fees will need to be deducted. Ms. Ebey waived notice. Ms. Forney expressed her concerns with regard to what was said in the papers and stated that Chris should not get extraordinary fees. Counsel addressed fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1731 46th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daphne Lin for and with Chris Forney (Administrator). Katrina Forney also present.

The sale was confirmed at $745,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The sale proceeds are to be deposited into blocked accounts in lieu of bond. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts was set for July 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-14-297399 Estate of Kenneth Herbert Forney, Jr. and PES-14-297416 Estate of Kenneth Forney.

Appearances: Robert Ferris for Robert Forney. Daphne Lin for and with Chris Forney. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Katrina Forney in Propria Persona. Yvettee Forney (Wife of Chris) also present.

The Parties reported that they were unable to resolve their dispute/differences and that they were not in agreement as to appointment of the Public Administrator. Discussion was held with regard to neither Party having resources to maintain the property, the difference in value ($500,000.00 versus $800,000.00) of the house as represented by each Party, the property being sold, the $300,000.00 mortgage and who is obligated to pay for said mortgage, an accounting being provided by Chris, the grandmother's trust, one half interest of the house to Claude (Decedent's Brother) who passed away on May 5, 2005 (not married and had no children), the Spouse of the Decedent and whether she is entitled to any portion of the property, title being held in the Father's name as separate property (grant deed recorded in 2004), whether title was properly transferred, Chris moving out of the house and no one paying the mortgage, whether Robert has any standing, whether a probate will be needed, etc. The Parties also confirmed that Kenneth Forney, Jr's date of death is May 15, 2008 (date obtained from death certificate). The Parties discussed the matter off the record and upon returning, agreed to the appointment of Chris Forney to serve with limited authority with out bond. The Court granted Chris Forney's Petition for Letters of Administration with limited authority (subject to review and modification of the order). Bond is not required. Robert Forney's petition is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Mar-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-14-297416 The Estate of Kenneth Forney and P{ES-14-297399 The Estate of Kenneth Herbert Forney Jr.

Appearances: Robert Ferris for Robert Forney. Daphne Lin for and with Chris Forney. Katrina Forney in Propria Persona.

Mr. Ferris stated that he made a proposal to be Co-Administrators, that it was rejected and suggested that the Public Administrator be appointed. Ms. Lin objects to appointment of the Public Administrator. Katrina approves. The Parties spoke of the Grandmother's intent, Susan's understanding/intent of the document she signed, family conflict, lack of Trust between the Petitioners, Susan's marital status, how Chris came about to reside in the residence, the issue of bond, etc. The Parties are in agreement that the property needs to be sold. The petitions for letters of administration were continued to March 5, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice of the amendment. The Court asked the Parties to talk about how they can most efficiently proceed and raised the issue of mediation. The Court will ask Mr. Ferdon to be present.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
